reference.title: DITA-OT Architecture Diagram
reference.shortdesc: ASCII reference diagram showing the complete DITA-OT HTML5 processing pipeline from inputs through preprocessing, transformation, and output.

fig.title: DITA-OT (HTML5) Architecture — preprocess vs preprocess2
fig.pre:
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ DITA-OT (HTML5) ARCHITECTURE — with preprocess2 option │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
INPUTS (your repo) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ • DITA map (.ditamap) + topics (.dita) │ │ • Resources (images/media/code) │ │ • DITAVAL filters (audience/platform/product/props) │ │ • Plug-ins (XSLT / Ant / Java) + build properties (.properties / CLI params) │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ | v SELECT PREPROCESSING PIPELINE (HTML5) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Choose ONE (depends on toolkit/version/transtype configuration): │ │ │ │ ┌───────────────────────────────┐ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ │ A) preprocess (legacy/mixed) │ OR │ B) preprocess2 (map-first) │ │ │ │ map + topic steps interleave │ │ complete map processing first, then │ │ │ └───────────────┬───────────────┘ │ process topics after map features are │ │ │ │ │ resolved │ │ │ │ └───────────────────┬──────────────────────┘ │ └───────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┘ | | v v COMMON PREPROCESSING RESPONSIBILITIES (both pipelines produce the same "normalized" intent) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ 1) Map parsing + key collection │ │ • keydefs, key scopes, key space │ │ 2) Conditional processing / filtering │ │ • DITAVAL/props applied → content included/excluded │ │ 3) Reference resolution │ │ • conref / conkeyref / keyref / coderef │ │ 4) Pull processing │ │ • metadata pulls, navtitle/title behavior │ │ 5) Chunking decisions + job file lists │ │ • "what becomes which HTML file/page" │ │ 6) Relationship/link metadata │ │ • maplink, rel tables │ │ │ │ RESULT: normalized + resolved intermediate content │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ | v TEMP WORKSPACE (work dir / temp dir) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ • normalized / filtered / resolved topics + maps │ │ • job configuration + file lists (what to build) │ │ • logs + diagnostics │ │ │ │ Debug rule: if intermediates are wrong, HTML5 output will be wrong. │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ | v HTML5 PROCESSING (format-specific) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ A) HTML5 XSLT transform │ │ • converts normalized DITA to HTML markup │ │ • applies your XSLT import overrides (if plug-in installed) │ │ │ │ B) Navigation / TOC generation │ │ • index/TOC artifacts │ │ • optional embedded nav per page (e.g., nav-toc=full) │ │ │ │ C) Post-processing / packaging │ │ • copy CSS/JS/images │ │ • add extra assets (search index, analytics hooks, etc.) │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ | v HTML5 OUTPUT (deliverable) ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ • chunked topic pages (or single-page output) │ │ • sidebar/embedded TOC (if configured) │ │ • CSS/JS/images/fonts (packaged into output) │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

fig.title: HTML5-focused customization control plane
fig.pre: ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Plug-ins + extension points can affect: │ │ │ │ • Preprocessing: Ant target hooks (recommended: pre/post preprocess) │ │ - add validation, metadata generation, diagnostics │ │ - step-specific hooks are more fragile and may differ between preprocess/preprocess2 │ │ │ │ • HTML5 processing: XSLT import overrides + TOC overrides + parameters │ │ - safest way to change HTML structure, classes, data-* hooks, nav markup │ │ │ │ • Build parameters: .properties/CLI (nav-toc, filters, css, chunking strategy, etc.) │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
